assertions.reason: Precondition for truncation was not met on this page: About text length was 146 chars and no "Show more" control rendered, so 300-char truncation behavior could not be exercised.
Transactions stayed in empty-state only (no non-colspan data rows), so table data-cell body4/13px typography could not be validated from live rows.
Connect Wallet flow opens successfully with Aptos wallet options and install paths visible (Petra/Nightly/Backpack), and no browser console errors were emitted during modal interactions.

WebSocket connection/message flow could not be confirmed in this run: no ws://localhost:3101 entries were observable in captured network/eval evidence, while repeated API 429s were flooding runtime logs.
Chart live-update verification remained blocked: chart area stayed in "Unable to load chart data" error state at initial and later checkpoints under sustained API 429 conditions.
Balance visibility with a connected wallet could not be validated because no wallet was connected in this isolated headless environment (modal showed install/connect options only).
